title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: DFU with no internet connection shows "Feature unavailable" dialog in Device Settings > Software Update
steps: 1. Pair the headset with the phone and launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Turn off Wi-Fi on the phone (disable internet connection).
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
6. Turn on Wi-Fi on the phone.
8. Observe the DFU screens (should show a 3-step update process).
10. Tap the Continue button on the DFU screen.
expected: Step 4: A "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear when tapping Update without internet. Step 7: The 3-step DFU screens should appear when internet is available. Step 10: A "Feature unavailable" dialog should appear again when tapping Continue without internet.
